overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit commercial walkways, digital billboards, and wet reflective streets. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the game's detailed urban environment with heavy artificial lighting and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway under transit overpass

events.description: entering covered commercial walkway from open crosswalk area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade, passing yellow crosswalk lines and entering the neon-lit corridor

notable_agents.action: person in bright green pants walking past the camera

entered.detail: red street sign with white text reading 'Sagan Ave' mounted on a pole
large illuminated digital screen displaying advertisements above the walkway
broad yellow and black striped crosswalk markings on the ground
overhead elevated transit track structure with supporting columns
illuminated shop signs with pink and purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a city crosswalk with the Sagan Ave sign visible, immediately transitioning into a covered commercial walkway beneath an elevated transit structure. The environment features wet reflective pavement, neon storefront signs, and large overhead digital billboards. Sparse pedestrians walk in scattered directions as the camera moves forward into the neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial promenade with digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing straight through the covered walkway, passing other pedestrians and observing the digital advertisements

entered.detail: tall wall of illuminated digital screens displaying various advertisements and brand logos
metal safety railing along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the covered commercial promenade, the scene features dense neon lighting and reflective wet pavement. Digital advertisement walls line the right side while the overhead transit structure continues above. Moderate crowds of pedestrians walk in the same direction, and the environment maintains a consistent cyberpunk aesthetic with purple and red neon accents.

events.description: waiting at crosswalk as a brown sedan drives through the intersection
turning right after crossing the street and continuing along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, pausing for traffic, then turning right to continue on the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: brown sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt road
open street intersection with visible traffic lights and crossing paths
tall pole with illuminated pedestrian crossing signal showing red hand

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide street intersection with a crosswalk. The camera waits as a brown sedan passes through, then crosses the white-lined crosswalk. After crossing, the camera turns right onto a new sidewalk section. The environment shifts from covered to exposed, with mixed lighting from street lamps and nearby neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with massive holographic samurai advertisement

events.description: large green holographic samurai figure becomes visible dominating the skyline ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the massive green holographic samurai advertisement, observing the surrounding neon-lit storefronts

entered.detail: massive glowing green holographic projection of a samurai figure holding a sword, towering above the buildings
large vertical array of digital screens displaying advertisements on the right side
tall multi-story building with illuminated windows and architectural lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a dramatic approach toward a massive green holographic samurai projection that dominates the skyline. The camera walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with digital billboards and neon-lit storefronts. The holographic figure grows progressively larger as the camera advances, creating a focal point against the dark night sky and surrounding tower blocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered neon corridor into a wide-open urban intersection dominated by a colossal holographic projection. It begins at a city crosswalk by the Sagan Ave sign, moving immediately into a covered commercial walkway where wet reflective pavement mirrors the glow of overhead digital billboards and neon storefronts. As the camera pushes deeper into this promenade, the lighting intensifies with purple and red accents and the crowd of pedestrians thickens beneath the elevated transit structure. The scene then opens into an exposed street intersection, pausing for a passing brown sedan before crossing the white-lined pavement and turning right onto a new sidewalk. Finally, the camera advances along a line of digital billboards toward a massive green holographic samurai that grows progressively larger until it dominates the dark night sky.
